app.title: HN AI Summarizer
app.footer: HN AI Summarizer - AI-powered Hacker News summarizer

settings.title: Settings

language.title: Language Settings
language.uiDescription: Language for the user interface, menus, and buttons
language.translationDescription: Language that Hacker News content will be translated to
language.independentNote: These two settings are completely independent

ai.title: AI Provider
ai.description: API keys are configured via .env file. Only providers with configured keys are listed.
ai.configHelp: Enter address for local providers like LM Studio or Ollama
ai.keyLocal: ℹ Local provider (no API key needed)

data.title: Data Processing
data.description: Manually fetch and process Hacker News data.

fetch.title: Fetch Settings
fetch.minScoreHelp: Only stories with score above this will be processed
fetch.retentionDaysHelp: Data older than this will be automatically deleted

preferences.title: User Preferences
preferences.blocklistHelp: Content containing these keywords will be dimmed

telegram.title: Telegram Notifications
telegram.description: Add your Telegram bot token to .env as TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN=. The bot token is never sent to the frontend, it is only read by the server.
telegram.chatIdHelp: Send a message to your bot, then visit https://api.telegram.org/bot<TOKEN>/getUpdates to find your chat ID.
telegram.enabledHelp: When enabled, you will receive a Telegram notification for each batch of newly processed stories.

settings.saveError: An error occurred while saving settings.

worker.started: Data fetch started! Processing may take a few minutes.
worker.reprocessStarted: Reprocessing started! Content and comments are being refreshed.
